notes: New: doubling cube (offerDouble/acceptDouble/declineDouble, MAX_CUBE_VALUE=8) and owner-only emergency pause() (blocks new games/joins/doubles/rolls/moves; never blocks resign/claimTimeout so active games can't be trapped). V1 BackgammonCore is untouched and still live for any games already in progress there -- this is a separate contract, not an upgrade. referralRegistry.setAuthorizedCaller and ratingRegistry.setReporter for this new address still need to be called by the PLATFORM_OWNER wallet (the deployer key no longer owns those registries) -- until then referral/rating hooks fail safe (no-op / fallback to treasury), core gameplay and payouts are unaffected. NOT audited: mainnet deployment needs explicit go-ahead.
